run_summary.summary: One update from today's scan: Kenny sent Ian (ian@popfly.com) the requested Popfly authorization screenshots at 10:20 AM today (Apr 21). Two earlier runs today both missed this — they're still showing waiting_on: 'us' / 'send screenshot,' but that action is done. Ball is back in Ian's court to investigate with his dev team. Flipping Flexsteel to waiting_on: brand. No other new emails — Linkind concept discussion (Apr 20 PM) and xTool decline were already captured in earlier runs.

suggestions.message: Kenny sent Ian the Popfly screenshots at 10:20 AM — Ian now has what he needs to investigate with his dev team. If no response by tomorrow (Apr 22), a quick follow-up ping to ian@popfly.com is worth it. Once the Popfly auth is resolved, next step is filming at Steinhafels Downers Grove, IL (planned mid-to-late May after father-in-law's pacemaker follow-up May 1).

deals.next_action: Wait for Ian's response on Popfly authorization fix — follow up Apr 22 if no reply
deals.notes: [Apr 21 10:20 AM]: Kenny sent Ian screenshots showing the Popfly managerial access authorization prompt. Ian is investigating with his dev team. Waiting on their response to complete campaign enrollment.
